testcase.name: test_components_navigation

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/buttons')' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"

testcase.name: test_page_2_navigation_to_form

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.failure: tests/page_2/test_page_2.py:17: in test_page_2_navigation_to_form page.locator("page.locator('#logo')").click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.name: test_TC_NAVIGATION_01

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: strict mode violation: locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary") resolved to 7 elements: 1) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Primary</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Primary") 2) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Left</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Left") 3) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Middle</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Middle") 4) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Right</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Right") 5) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">1</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="1") 6) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">2</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="2") 7) <button type="button" id="btnGroupDrop1" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="dropdown" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary dropdown-toggle">↵ Dropdown↵ </button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Dropdown")
Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary")

testcase.failure: tests/page_3_9ddb/test_page_3_9ddb.py:21: in test_TC_NAVIGATION_01 expect(page.locator('button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary')).to_be_visible(timeout=10000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: strict mode violation: locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary") resolved to 7 elements: E 1) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Primary</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Primary") E 2) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Left</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Left") E 3) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Middle</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Middle") E 4) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Right</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Right") E 5) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">1</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="1") E 6) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">2</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="2") E 7) <button type="button" id="btnGroupDrop1" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="dropdown" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary dropdown-toggle">↵ Dropdown↵ </button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Dropdown") E E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 10000ms E - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary")
